intro: Rangium saxatile, also known as Saxifrage, is a perennial plant species within the Saxifragaceae family, characterized by its succulent leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Saxifrage include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Saxifrage is commonly used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body.
